insight: Master Bot appears to evaluate Corpus as comparable in value to Wall based on raw gold-equivalent cost (Corpus costs 6RR ≈ 8 gold; Wall costs 5B ≈ 6.67 gold), and may prefer Corpus over Wall in situations where Wall is the strategically correct defensive buy. This suggests MB has weaknesses in evaluating defensive unit selection beyond raw gold cost.
author: shadourow
context: Shadourow comments on a bot decision to buy Corpus over Wall, sarcastically noting the bot's apparent gold-equivalence logic.
